P0_Immediate.title: Daily Ops Report v1
P0_Immediate.description: Build the structured daily ops report surface that combines: (1) marketSummary.regimeContext from T-12, (2) freshnessAlert from T-11, (3) walk-forward skeleton summary from T-10, (4) data coverage status. Expose as /api/ops/daily or integrate into /api/report/daily response. This is the natural next step now that all three context providers are in place.

P1_Next.title: Unified Freshness Guard + dataCoverage Write
P1_Next.description: Wire freshnessAlert.requiresAction into the scheduler/pipeline as a blocking guard. When regimeContext.freshnessAlert.requiresAction is true, emit alert to log / ops channel. Depends on T-12 for regimeContext to be available from DailyReportEngine.

P1_Next.title: Lane-based Scheduler Heartbeat
P1_Next.description: Extend the scheduler with periodic heartbeat that checks freshnessAlert levels across MarketRegimeResult, StockQuote, and MarketIndex. Surface in ops report.

P2_Deferred.title: Replace DEFAULT_CURRENT_DATE hardcoded with dynamic date
P2_Deferred.description: DEFAULT_CURRENT_DATE = '2026-05-06' is hardcoded. Replace with dynamic date source (e.g., server time or configurable env var) for production readiness.

P2_Deferred.title: Portfolio Walk-Forward at Scale
P2_Deferred.description: Run T-10 enriched walk-forward skeleton at production scale (full date range) and integrate regime context outputs into DailyReportEngine.
